single_exe.note: host 单可执行(cargo 产出);UC-03 demo 为本地构建产物不打包再分发(M8/G1),rx build 经包管理对接见 PR 描述

redgreen.red_command: 篡改 uc03_demo 落盘帧像素字节序(R/B 通道交换)后计 content SHA-256
redgreen.green_command: py -3 ci/uc03_demo_smoke.py(固定初值两次运行逐帧 content SHA-256 逐字节一致)
redgreen.run_url: local red-green(反 YAML-only,H06 D11.8-2);pr-smoke 步骤 32 self-hosted runner run URL 见 PR 描述
